alt: Aerial view of Great Stirrup Cay in the Bahamas seen from an approaching cruise ship, showing a low sandy island with a blue and white tower, beach, vegetation, and turquoise Caribbean water with coral outcrops
description: Great Stirrup Cay, Norwegian Cruise Line private island in the Berry Islands, Bahamas. Photographed 29 February 2024 from an approaching cruise ship. The blue-and-white communications tower at center is a recognizable landmark visible from arriving vessels; sand beach, vegetation, and the turquoise water with coral outcrops are characteristic of the island.
title: Great Stirrup Cay, Bahamas
